clues: A computer has completely lost all network connectivity across both Ethernet and Wi-Fi.
Both network adapters show 'No internet access' or 'Unidentified network'.
Device Manager shows no errors on either network adapter.
IP configuration shows an unusual 0.0.0.0 address instead of a valid IP or APIPA address.
Resetting the TCP/IP stack using 'netsh int ip reset' resolves the issue.
